ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_vacancies" (
  "vacancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job vacancy record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter the data was collected */,
  "total_vacancies" INTEGER /* Total number of job vacancies */,
  "less_than_15_days" INTEGER /* Number of job vacancies lasting less than 15 days */,
  "fifteen_to_29_days" INTEGER /* Number of job vacancies lasting 15-29 days */,
  "thirty_to_59_days" INTEGER /* Number of job vacancies lasting 30-59 days */,
  "sixty_to_89_days" INTEGER /* Number of job vacancies lasting 60-89 days */,
  "ninety_days_or_more" INTEGER /* Number of job vacancies lasting 90 days or more */,
  "ninety_to_119_days" INTEGER /* Number of job vacancies lasting 90-119 days */,
  "one_hundred_twenty_days_or_more" INTEGER /* Number of job vacancies lasting 120 days or more */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title associated with the vacancy */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Job description associated with the vacancy */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Required skills for the job */,
  "required_experience" TEXT /* Required experience for the job */,
  "education_requirement" TEXT /* Education requirement for the job */,
  "job_category" TEXT /* Job category (e.g., full-time, part-time, contract) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vacancy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the region is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector that the industry belongs to (e.g., private, public) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_vacancy_regions" (
  "vacancy_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job vacancy region record */,
  "vacancy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job vacancy record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "vacancy_rate" REAL /* Vacancy rate for the region (calculated as total vacancies / total labor force) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vacancy_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_vacancy_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_vacancy_regions_vacancy_id FOREIGN KEY ("vacancy_id") REFERENCES job_vacancies ("vacancy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_vacancy_industries" (
  "vacancy_industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job vacancy industry record */,
  "vacancy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job vacancy record */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "vacancy_rate" REAL /* Vacancy rate for the industry (calculated as total vacancies / total labor force) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vacancy_industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_vacancy_industries_vacancy_id FOREIGN KEY ("vacancy_id") REFERENCES job_vacancies ("vacancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_vacancy_industries_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "vacancy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job vacancy record accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used to filter the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vacancy_id FOREIGN KEY ("vacancy_id") REFERENCES job_vacancies ("vacancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_vacancy_sources" (
  "vacancy_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job vacancy data source record */,
  "vacancy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job vacancy record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vacancy_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_vacancy_sources_vacancy_id FOREIGN KEY ("vacancy_id") REFERENCES job_vacancies ("vacancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_vacancy_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data record */,
  "data_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)
